notes: A big card-correctness pass plus a much smarter Advanced AI. Card effects: a sweep of all 2,636 cards fixed a large batch that did nothing or fired wrong - Trigger abilities that re-use a card's own [Counter]/[On Play]/[On K.O.] effect, Stage cards played from Life, 23 cards whose Trigger never fired, board wipes (Kaido, Birdcage), protections, [Rush: Character] and more; plus a 228-card fix where a Character used as a Counter wrongly fired its unrelated 'Then, ...' clause, buffs that lit up the opponent's cards as targets, and the ST14 Luffy/Franky effects. Smarter AI: the Advanced bot now understands the engines meta decks are built around - trash/mill recursion + sacrifice-to-recur, DON engines and DON-minus payment, cost-manipulation combos, removal fidelity (cost-KO vs power-KO vs -power vs freeze), threat-by-effect, restand/multi-attack, and DON opportunity cost. Multiplayer: fixed casual play hanging on 'Connecting to your opponent' on the second match of a session, and friends now persist. UI: blocker shield glow + hover popout + click-to-block, tighter DON groupings, end-of-match results button moved off the opponent's hand, summoning-sick cards faded, rested cards flip onto their right side, opponent hand-repositioning is now visible, and a themed update screen.
